data.title: GREEN: Implement security-red-team reviewer delta and build mapping
data.description:
## Description
Create the security red team reviewer-delta file and add the tier mapping to build-review-agents.sh.

### Implementation
1. Add security-red-team to _model_for_tier() returning "opus"
2. Add security-red-team to _description_for_tier() with appropriate description
3. Create plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-red-team.md with:
   - Tier identity: aggressive security red team reviewer
   - 8 AI-advantaged security criteria: authorization completeness, untrusted-input-to-dangerous-sink data flow (multi-hop, cross-file), fail-open error handling, state machine integrity, privilege escalation via indirect paths, cryptographic misuse, TOCTOU race conditions, trust boundary violations
   - Scrutiny lenses: new entry points, sensitive data exposure
   - Hard exclusion list: test-only files, deterministic tool criteria (Bandit/Semgrep/CodeQL)
   - Anti-manufacturing directive
   - Rationalizations-to-reject list
   - NO ticket context provided (red team reviews without context)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-red-team.md (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/unit/scripts/test-build-review-agents.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED: 0"
- [ ] Agent file generated at plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/build-review-agents.sh && test -f plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md
- [ ] Generated agent has model: opus in frontmatter
  Verify: grep -q "model: opus" plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-security-red-team.md
- [ ] Delta file contains all 8 security criteria
  Verify: grep -c "authorization\|data flow\|fail-open\|state machine\|privilege escalation\|cryptographic\|TOCTOU\|trust boundary" plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-delta-security-red-team.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
